session.user:
Update the following test files to rename CLI flags from the old names to new names. Do NOT use sed commands - use the Edit tool to make targeted replacements. Read each file first.
## Changes needed:
### File 1: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/branch/test_create_cmd.py`
Replace all occurrences of: - `"--for-plan"` → `"--for-pr"` (in CLI invocation lists like `["br", "create", "--for-plan", "123"]`) - In docstrings/comments: `--for-plan` → `--for-pr` - Error message assertions: `"Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-plan"` → `"Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-pr"` - Error message assertions: `"Must provide BRANCH argument or --for-plan option"` → `"Must provide BRANCH argument or --for-pr option"`
### File 2: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py`
Replace all occurrences of: - `"--for-plan"` → `"--for-pr"` (in CLI invocation lists) - In docstrings/comments: `--for-plan` → `--for-pr` - Error message assertions: `"Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-plan"` → `"Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-pr"` - Error message assertions: `"Must provide BRANCH argument or --for-plan option"` → `"Must provide BRANCH argument or --for-pr option"`
### File 3: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/create/test_plan_file_operations.py`
Replace all occurrences of: - `"--from-plan-file"` → `"--from-pr-file"` (in CLI invocation lists) - `"--keep-plan-file"` → `"--keep-pr-file"` (in CLI invocation lists) - Error message assertions: `"--keep-plan-file requires --from-plan-file"` → `"--keep-pr-file requires --from-pr-file"` - Error message assertions: `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-plan-file"` → `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-pr-file"` - In docstrings/comments: `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file`, `--keep-plan-file` → `--keep-pr-file`
### File 4: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/create/test_output_modes.py`
Replace all occurrences of: - `"--from-plan-file"` → `"--from-pr-file"` (in CLI invocation lists) - In docstrings/comments: `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file`
### File 5: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/test_create_copy_impl.py`
Replace all occurrences of: - `"--copy-plan"` → `"--copy-pr"` (in CLI invocation lists) - `"--from-plan-file"` → `"--from-pr-file"` (in CLI invocation lists) - Error message assertions: `"--copy-plan"` → `"--copy-pr"`, `"--from-plan-file"` → `"--from-pr-file"` - In docstrings/comments: `--copy-plan` → `--copy-pr`, `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file`
### File 6: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/management/test_impl.py`
Replace all occurrences of: - `"--from-plan-file"` → `"--from-pr-file"` (in CLI invocation lists) - Error message assertions: `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-plan-file"` → `"Cannot specify both NAME and --from-pr-file"` - In docstrings/comments: `--from-plan-file` → `--from-pr-file`
### File 7: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/commands/test_execute_command.py`
Replace all occurrences of: - `"erk br co --for-plan 123"` → `"erk br co --for-pr 123"` (in assertions) - `"Copied: erk br co --for-plan 123"` → `"Copied: erk br co --for-pr 123"` (in assertions)
### File 8: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_plan_detail_screen.py`
Replace all occurrences of: - `"erk br co --for-plan 123"` → `"erk br co --for-pr 123"` (in assertions)
IMPORTANT: - Only change CLI flag strings like `"--for-plan"` and docstring/comment/assertion strings that reference those flags - Do NOT change Python variable names like `for_plan` (those were handled separately) - Do NOT change things like `test_branch_create_for_plan_creates_branch_and_impl_folder` (function names, these describe the test concept and can stay) - Do NOT change things like `"Derive name from plan filename"` (conceptual references) - Only change strings that are literally CLI flag invocations or error messages about CLI flags
Read each file first before editing. Make targeted edits.
session.assistant: I'll read each file first and then make the targeted replacements to rename the CLI flags.

1→"""Tests for plan file handling in worktree creation.""" 2→ 3→from click.testing import CliRunner 4→ 5→from erk.cli.cli import cli 6→from erk.cli.config import LoadedConfig 7→from erk.core.repo_discovery import RepoContext 8→from erk_shared.naming import WORKTREE_DATE_SUFFIX_FORMAT, default_branch_for_worktree 9→from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit 10→from tests.fakes.gateway.time import DEFAULT_FAKE_TIME 11→from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import erk_isolated_fs_env 12→ 13→# Deterministic date suffix from FakeTime, used by ctx.time.now() in tests 14→_FAKE_DATE_SUFFIX = DEFAULT_FAKE_TIME.strftime(WORKTREE_DATE_SUFFIX_FORMAT) 15→ 16→ 17→def test_create_with_plan_file() -> None: 18→ """Test creating a worktree with a plan file.""" 19→ runner = CliRunner() 20→ with erk_isolated_fs_env(runner, env_overrides=None) as env: 21→ # Create plan file 22→ plan_file = env.cwd / "my-feature-plan.md" 23→ plan_file.write_text("# My Feature Plan\n", encoding="utf-8") 24→ 25→ repo_dir = env.setup_repo_structure() 26→ 27→ # Pass local config directly 28→ local_config = LoadedConfig.test() 29→ 30→ git_ops = FakeGit(
... [318 lines omitted] ...
102→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed for {plan_filename}: {result.output}" 182→ """Test that --keep-plan-file without --from-plan-file fails with error message."""

1→"""Tests for output modes (JSON, script, --stay) in worktree creation.""" 2→ 3→import json 4→ 5→from click.testing import CliRunner 6→ 7→from erk.cli.cli import cli 8→from erk.cli.config import LoadedConfig 9→from erk.core.repo_discovery import RepoContext 10→from erk_shared.naming import WORKTREE_DATE_SUFFIX_FORMAT 11→from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit 12→from tests.fakes.gateway.time import DEFAULT_FAKE_TIME 13→from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import erk_inmem_env, erk_isolated_fs_env 14→ 15→ 16→def test_create_with_json_output() -> None: 17→ """Test creating a worktree with JSON output.""" 18→ runner = CliRunner() 19→ with erk_inmem_env(runner) as env: 20→ repo_dir = env.setup_repo_structure() 21→ 22→ config_toml = repo_dir / "config.toml" 23→ config_toml.write_text("", encoding="utf-8") 24→ 25→ git_ops = FakeGit( 26→ git_common_dirs={env.cwd: env.git_dir}, 27→ default_branches={env.cwd: "main"}, 28→ ) 29→ 30→ test_ctx = env.build_context(git=git_ops)
... [295 lines omitted] ...
73→ # Verify JSON error output 101→ # Should fail with validation error

1→"""Tests for erk create --copy-plan flag.""" 2→ 3→from click.testing import CliRunner 4→ 5→from erk.cli.cli import cli 6→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import WorktreeInfo 7→from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit 8→from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import erk_isolated_fs_env 9→ 10→ 11→def test_create_copy_plan_success() -> None: 12→ """Test --copy-plan copies plan directory to new worktree.""" 13→ from erk_shared.impl_folder import get_impl_dir 14→ 15→ runner = CliRunner() 16→ with erk_isolated_fs_env(runner, env_overrides=None) as env: 17→ # Setup: Create branch-scoped impl folder in current worktree (at repo root) 18→ source_impl_dir = get_impl_dir(env.cwd, branch_name="main") 19→ source_impl_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) 20→ (source_impl_dir / "plan.md").write_text("# Plan content", encoding="utf-8") 21→ progress_content = ( 22→ "---
completed_steps: 2
total_steps: 5
---

" 23→ "- [x] Step 1
- [x] Step 2
- [ ] Step 3" 24→ ) 25→ (source_impl_dir / "progress.md").write_text(progress_content, encoding="utf-8") 26→ 27→ # Setup: Configure git state 28→ git = FakeGit( 29→ git_common_dirs={env.cwd: env.git_dir}, 30→ default_branches={env.cwd: "main"},
... [243 lines omitted] ...
46→ catch_exceptions=False, 77→def test_create_copy_plan_missing_plan_error() -> None: 78→ """Test --copy-plan errors when current directory has no .impl/.""" 100→ catch_exceptions=False, 103→ # Assert: Command failed with error 106→ # Assert: Error message mentions missing implementation directory 141→ catch_exceptions=False, 144→ # Assert: Command failed with error 147→ # Assert: Error message explains mutual exclusion 198→ catch_exceptions=False, 254→ catch_exceptions=False,

- Add login
- Add signup
" 26→ plan_file.write_text(plan_content, encoding="utf-8") 27→ 28→ # Configure FakeGit with root worktree only 29→ git_ops = FakeGit( 30→ worktrees={

49→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Command failed: {result.output}" 101→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Command failed: {result.output}" 116→ """Test that providing both NAME and --from-plan-file is an error.""" 194→ # Should fail with reserved name error 197→ f"Expected error about 'root' being reserved, got: {result.output}" 240→ # Should fail with reserved name error 241→ assert result.exit_code != 0, f"Expected failure for name '{name_variant}'" 242→ error_msg = ( 243→ f"Expected error about 'root' being reserved for '{name_variant}', " 246→ assert "reserved" in result.output.lower(), error_msg 284→ # Should fail with error suggesting to use root 330→ # Should fail with error suggesting to use root 377→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Command failed: {result.output}"

1→"""Tests for PlanDetailScreen.execute_command.""" 2→ 3→from datetime import UTC, datetime 4→ 5→from erk.tui.data.types import PrRowData 6→from erk.tui.screens.plan_detail_screen import PlanDetailScreen 7→from erk.tui.views.types import ViewMode 8→from tests.fakes.gateway.command_executor import FakeCommandExecutor 9→from tests.fakes.gateway.plan_data_provider import make_pr_row 10→ 11→ 12→class TestExecuteCommandBrowserCommands: 13→ """Tests for browser-related commands.""" 14→ 15→ def test_open_browser_opens_pr_url_when_available(self) -> None: 16→ """open_browser opens PR URL when PR is available.""" 17→ row = make_pr_row( 18→ 123, 19→ "Test", 20→ pr_url="https://github.com/test/repo/pull/456", 21→ ) 22→ executor = FakeCommandExecutor() 23→ screen = PlanDetailScreen(row=row, executor=executor, view_mode=ViewMode.PLANS) 24→ screen.execute_command("open_browser") 25→ assert executor.opened_urls == ["https://github.com/test/repo/pull/456"] 26→ 27→ def test_open_browser_opens_issue_url_when_no_pr(self) -> None: 28→ """open_browser opens issue URL when no PR is available.""" 29→ row = make_pr_row(123, "Test", pr_url="https://github.com/test/repo/issues/123") 30→ executor = FakeCommandExecutor()
... [367 lines omitted] ...

1→"""Tests for PlanDetailScreen modal.""" 2→ 3→from pathlib import Path 4→ 5→import pytest 6→ 7→from erk.tui.app import ErkDashApp 8→from erk.tui.data.types import PrFilters 9→from erk.tui.screens.plan_detail_screen import PlanDetailScreen 10→from tests.fakes.gateway.clipboard import FakeClipboard 11→from tests.fakes.gateway.plan_data_provider import FakePrDataProvider, make_pr_row 12→from tests.fakes.gateway.pr_service import FakePrService 13→ 14→ 15→class TestPlanDetailScreen: 16→ """Tests for PlanDetailScreen modal.""" 17→ 18→ @pytest.mark.asyncio 19→ async def test_space_opens_detail_screen(self) -> None: 20→ """Pressing space opens the plan detail modal.""" 21→ provider = FakePrDataProvider(plans=[make_pr_row(123, "Test Plan", pr_title="Test PR")]) 22→ filters = PrFilters.default() 23→ app = ErkDashApp( 24→ provider=provider, service=FakePrService(), filters=filters, refresh_interval=0 25→ ) 26→ 27→ async with app.run_test() as pilot: 28→ await pilot.pause() 29→ await pilot.pause() 30→

1→"""Unit tests for branch create command.""" 2→ 3→from datetime import UTC, datetime 4→ 5→from click.testing import CliRunner 6→ 7→from erk.cli.cli import cli 8→from erk.cli.config import LoadedConfig 9→from erk.core.repo_discovery import RepoContext 10→from erk.core.worktree_pool import PoolState, SlotAssignment, load_pool_state, save_pool_state 11→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import WorktreeInfo 12→from erk_shared.plan_store.types import Plan, PlanState 13→from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit 14→from tests.fakes.gateway.graphite import FakeGraphite 15→from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import erk_isolated_fs_env 16→from tests.test_utils.plan_helpers import create_pr_backend_with_plans 17→ 18→# Fixed timestamp for test Plan objects - deterministic test data 19→TEST_PLAN_TIMESTAMP = datetime(2024, 1, 15, 10, 30, 0, tzinfo=UTC) 20→ 21→ 22→def test_branch_create_creates_new_branch_and_assignment(tmp_path) -> None: 23→ """Test that branch create creates a new branch and assignment.""" 24→ runner = CliRunner() 25→ with erk_isolated_fs_env(runner, env_overrides=None) as env: 26→ repo_dir = env.setup_repo_structure() 27→ 28→ git_ops = FakeGit( 29→ worktrees=env.build_worktrees("main"), 30→ current_branches={env.cwd: "main"},

1→"""Tests for erk br co (branch checkout) command.""" 2→ 3→import os 4→from datetime import UTC, datetime 5→from unittest.mock import patch 6→ 7→from click.testing import CliRunner 8→ 9→from erk.cli.cli import cli 10→from erk.cli.commands.branch import branch_group 11→from erk.core.repo_discovery import RepoContext 12→from erk.core.worktree_pool import ( 13→ PoolState, 14→ SlotAssignment, 15→ load_pool_state, 16→ save_pool_state, 17→) 18→from erk_shared.gateway.git.abc import WorktreeInfo 19→from erk_shared.gateway.graphite.disabled import GraphiteDisabled, GraphiteDisabledReason 20→from erk_shared.plan_store.types import Plan, PlanState 21→from tests.fakes.gateway.git import FakeGit 22→from tests.fakes.gateway.graphite import FakeGraphite 23→from tests.test_utils.context_builders import build_workspace_test_context 24→from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import erk_inmem_env, erk_isolated_fs_env 25→from tests.test_utils.plan_helpers import create_pr_backend_with_plans 26→ 27→# Fixed timestamp for test Plan objects 28→TEST_PLAN_TIMESTAMP = datetime(2024, 1, 15, 10, 30, 0, tzinfo=UTC) 29→ 30→
... [711 lines omitted] ...
67→ cli, ["br", "co", "feature-branch", "--script"], obj=test_ctx, catch_exceptions=False 72→ # Should not show Graphite error 112→ cli, ["br", "co", "feature-branch", "--script"], obj=test_ctx, catch_exceptions=False 117→ # Should not show Graphite error 141→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 177→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 188→ """Test that checking out a non-existent branch fails with helpful error.""" 253→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 300→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 318→ Verifies the fix where display_sync_status errors could prevent activation 348→ ahead_behind_raises=RuntimeError("upstream tracking ref not set"), 367→ # get_ahead_behind raises RuntimeError, simulating upstream tracking ref not set. 372→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 376→def test_checkout_for_plan_error_both_branch_and_for_plan() -> None: 397→def test_checkout_for_plan_error_neither_branch_nor_for_plan() -> None: 455→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 464→# --- Script mode error resilience tests --- 468→ """Regression test: --script success path is not broken by error handler.""" 505→ catch_exceptions=False, 511→ # The written script should NOT be an error script 556→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 609→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 666→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}" 726→ assert result.exit_code == 0, f"Failed: {result.output}"
